title: fagara senegalensis
intro: Fagara senegalensis, also known as the African prickly ash, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Fagara senegalensis include relief from fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and bark are often used to make decoctions, infusions, and tonics, which can be used to treat various ailments.
